creator: kyle@rageout.org
text:
4.0-STABLE & 5.0-CURRENT (build from 4/09/2000)

pcm0 driver does not seam to support any app that uses a direct DMA, ie(quake3)
etc.
Soundcards tried: SB16- non-pnp
sb32-awe32, soundblaster vibra16

How-To-Repeat: Use direct DMA access with the new PCM driver. (no sound output)
